extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Adam caught breakaway rider Navarro in final meters of Plateau de Solaison after waiting tactically while THOMAS Geraint cracked
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam reversed pattern from earlier stages, waiting instead of attacking first, delivering fresh kick in final meters.
Team Sky abandoned THOMAS Geraint's chase after flat on Col d'Iseran descent, preserving podium over stage win.
BARDET Romain's attack on Col de Romme with THOMAS/YATES present failed, revealing insufficient acceleration against top climbers.
BODNAR Roman controlled tempo for Sky protecting podium, not chasing THOMAS flat, showing team prioritization shift mid-race.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: demonstrated tactical maturity by reversing his early-attack pattern, saving energy when previously aggressive throughout Dauphine
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: cracked in final meters after recovering from flat, suggesting vulnerability when forced to chase after mechanical
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: attack on Col de Romme neutralized by THOMAS/YATES easily, lacked acceleration to distance top GC rivals
rider_signals.NAVARRO Daniel: neutral: held off GC favorites until final meters from early break, four seconds from victory
